HGSS.135.0001:
I feel it!\f
The twinkle in your eyes!
The twinkle of friendship!\f
You’re quite something.
Your [0100,0001,0000] is quite a Pokémon!\f
It’s ready to participate in the
Pokéathlon, bud!\f
Most of all, your solidarity with and
trust of Pokémon makes me\r
believe in infinite potential!\f
All right. Follow me!\f
HGSS.135.0002:
What do you think?
This is the Pokéathlon Dome!\f
HGSS.135.0003:
Pokéathlon is a sports festival for
Trainers and Pokémon!\f
Inside the Dome are various challenges
awaiting Trainers and Pokémon to test\r
their friendship.\r
Why don’t you try it?\f
HGSS.135.0004:
You’re amazing, bud!
This is a pleasant surprise!\f
To see a Pokéathlete with strong
potential is such a pleasure! I’m glad\r
I held the Pokéathlon here in Johto.\f
...My name is Magnus.
We shall meet again, bud.\f
Magnus: See you, young Pokéathlete!\f
HGSS.135.0005:
I feel it!\f
The twinkle in your eyes!
The twinkle of friendship!\f
You’re ready to participate in the
Pokéathlon, bud!\f
Most of all, your mutual trust and
teamwork with Pokémon makes me\r
believe anything is possible!\f
All right. Follow me, bud!\f
HGSS.135.0007:
Running and jumping and...
There are so many events for Pokémon\r
to choose from. Which one should I try?
HGSS.135.0009: There is more to Pokémon than battling!
HGSS.135.0011:
It’s not good at battles...but no
Pokémon can beat it at running, thanks\r
to the walk we take every morning!
HGSS.135.0012:
Huff huff!
Everyday training is the sure way\r
to glory!\f
Dashing 1,000 times!
That’s my goal for now.\f
HGSS.135.0013:
What’s your goal?
Having a goal lets you enjoy life more.
HGSS.135.0014:
............
Oh, you have done the dash 1,000 times?\f
I thought it was basically impossible,
but you make me feel courageous.\f
Thank you!
Please take this!\f
HGSS.135.0015:
I’ve become your fan! I would run
anywhere for you!\r
I’ll be supporting you!
HGSS.135.0017:
Have you heard of Aprijuice?\f
Pokémon can increase their Performance
with food and drink.\f
Aprijuice is a drink developed from
nutrition research to improve\r
Performance.\f
If you let your Pokémon drink it before
a Pokéathlon event, it will show its\r
true potential!
HGSS.135.0019:
Each Pokémon has its unique traits.\f
A true Pokéathlete knows them and lets
the true Performance of his or her\r
Pokémon emerge!
HGSS.135.0021:
Oh!
They look good today!\f
They weren’t so well yesterday, but
we’ll win today for sure!
HGSS.135.0025:
Energy drink!
Welcome to the Aprijuice stand!\f
Are you giving your Pokémon Aprijuice?
I can explain anything you\r
need to know about it! [0200,0000]
HGSS.135.0026:
Energy drink!
Welcome to the Aprijuice stand!\f
Huh? What’s that confused look about?
You don’t know about Aprijuice?\r
There, take this!\f
HGSS.135.0028:
You put away the Apriblender
in the Apricorn Box.\f
HGSS.135.0029:
When you have the Apriblender, you can
make Aprijuice to let your Pokémon show\r
their true potential!\f
It’s so easy to make! All you have to
do is to put Apricorns in the\r
Apriblender. Put in as many as you can!\f
The more, the merrier!
Then you walk!\f
You can run if you want...
98...99...100 steps!\f
Here! Then you open it, give it to your
Pokémon, or drink it yourself.\f
You can buy Aprijuice here.
Why don’t you try and see how it works?\f
Do you have any more questions? [0200,0000]
HGSS.135.0030:
Aprijuice improves a Pokémon’s
Performance! Pokémon have strengths\r
and weaknesses.\f
But there is no need to worry. Give it
Aprijuice, and you can max out its\r
Performance!\f
You will need it!\f
Do you have any more questions? [0200,0000]
HGSS.135.0031:
Choose from the three Apriblenders.\f
The labels tell you what kind of drink
it is. Different drinks have\r
different effects.\f
You should use them to suit the event
you want to participate in. That’s how\r
to make a top Pokéathlete.\f
But remember this!
If your Pokémon’s Performance is maxed\r
out, you cannot make it higher.\f
You should check your Pokémon’s
Performance before you\r
give it Aprijuice.\f
Do you have any more questions? [0200,0000]
HGSS.135.0032:
Charge yourself with friendship!
Get in the know about Aprijuice!\r
Pick one from the shelf!
HGSS.135.0034:
Thank you!
Which Pokémon do you want to give it to?\f
HGSS.135.0035:
Charge yourself with friendship!
Come back again when you want more!\f
HGSS.135.0036:
That’s a pity!
Come back when you want to win!\f
HGSS.135.0037: Oh, you don’t have enough money!\f
HGSS.135.0039: Hi! What can I do for you?\f
HGSS.135.0040:
Its richness is [0134,0003,0000]!
Its smoothness is [0134,0004,0000]!\f
HGSS.135.0041:
Owner’s Comment
Somebody, somewhere put it together!\r
The mysterious [0108,0001,0000]!\f
It may go up.
It may go down.\r
May your luck be with this juice!\f
HGSS.135.0042:
Owner’s Comment
Not many people know about it!\f
It’s the newcomer Pokéathlete
[0103,0000,0000]’s [0108,0001,0000]!\f
It’s a long way to perfection!
But it’s irresistible to some!\r
It’s a gleam of [0108,0001,0000]!\f
HGSS.135.0043:
Owner’s Comment
You know who’s around here!\f
This [0108,0001,0000] is what has helped
make you-know-who who they\r
are today!\r
Try it if you feel sluggish!\f
HGSS.135.0044:
Owner’s Comment
You don’t know it?\r
That’s the last thing you want to hear!\f
It is time you try [0103,0000,0000]’s
[0108,0001,0000], the sign of a new era!\f
HGSS.135.0045:
Owner’s Comment
[0108,0001,0000] was developed by\r
that popular Pokéathlete!\f
You may never be able to shake hands,
but you can still drink the same juice!\f
This is a must-buy juice for every
Pokéathlete!\f
HGSS.135.0046:
Owner’s Comment
[0108,0001,0000]!\r
Developed by that elite Pokéathlete!\f
You may never see it again.
If you won’t win today, when will you?\f
For those who want to win today, here
is the juice of victory!\f
HGSS.135.0047:
Owner’s Comment
[0108,0001,0000] of the legendary\r
Pokéathlete!\f
It grew side by side with [0103,0000,0000]!\f
The road to victory is shown when you
drink it! This will make you a legend!\f
HGSS.135.0048:
It improves your Pokémon’s
Performance!\f
Let it shine its best with Aprijuice!
HGSS.135.0049:
The Pokéathlon Dome
The Place for True Pokéathletes!
